title: Circle beats Q4 earnings estimates as USDC supply jumps 72%; shares surge 20%
message_html: Circle beats Q4 earnings estimates as USDC supply jumps 72%; shares surge 20% ...
snippet: The stablecoin issuer reported $770 million in revenue for the final 2025 quarter, beating forecasts as full-year sales rose 64% and USDC circulation topped $75 billion.

title: Democrat Senator Launches $1.7B Iran Sanctions Probe Into Binance
message_html: Democrat Senator Launches $1.7B Iran Sanctions Probe Into Binance ...
snippet: Senator Richard Blumenthal has launched an inquiry into alleged Iran-linked crypto transfers as Binance pushes back against the claims.

title: EU regulator ESMA warns on crypto perpetuals. But also applies to tokenized stocks

snippet: Yesterday the European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA) published a statement noting that many crypto perpetuals for the likes of Bitcoin and Ether would be considered to be contracts for differences (CFDs).
